name: Gr_cluster_chr2R_64A
description: Drosophila chemoreceptor cluster: Gustatory receptor cluster (Gr64a-f sugar receptors) on chr2R. Drosophila has ~60 Or and ~60 Gr chemoreceptor genes total, dispersed across the genome with several tandem sub-clusters. Intra-cluster identity 40-95%, no genome-wide superfamily expansion like mammalian ORs.
